info.description: This is a high-performance dating app backend server.
info.title: Dating App API

post.summary: Reload settings from database to RAM
WIPE and Reset all configs to code defaults
Simulate adding a boost package to user
Simulate adding a crush package to user
Simulate user subscription to a plan

post.description: Checks if the provided email is already registered in the system.
Handles Google OAuth authentication, including automatic account linking if the email already exists.
Authenticates a user with email and password and returns a JWT token.
Revokes tokens and deactivates the associated device for the currently authenticated user.
Allows the client to get a new access token using a valid refresh token and device ID.
Creates a new user account using email and password.

get.description: Get a list of all active conversations for the authenticated user

post.description: Get or create a 1:1 conversation between matched users

get.description: Get paginated message history for a specific conversation
Generate a presigned S3/Oracle URL for uploading chat attachments
get.summary: Get presigned upload URL for chat media

get.description: Returns a list of all active gender options for user profiling.
Returns a list of all active interests/hobbies options.
Returns a list of all active spoken languages options.
Returns a list of all active relationship types (e.g., Short-term, Long-term) for user profiling.
Get a list of all buyable consumable packets (boosts, crushes)
Get a list of all available subscription plans with prices and features

get.summary: Get current user's subscription status and features

post.description: Records a user's swipe interaction with another user. If it's a mutual LIKE or CRUSH, it returns a Match ID.
post.summary: Record a swipe action (LIKE, CRUSH or DISLIKE)

get.description: Fetches a weighted-random list of active users that the current user hasn't swiped on yet, applying cooldowns and priority scoring.
get.summary: Get list of users for swipe discovery

get.description: Fetches a list of users who have liked or crushed on the current user, ordered by priority score (Crushes first, then Premium likes, then standard likes).
get.summary: Get list of incoming likes and crushes

get.description: Fetches a list of users the current user has liked or crushed on, but who have not yet matched back.

post.description: Reverts the most recent swipe (like, dislike, or crush). If it was a match, the match is also removed. Returns the details of the undone user so they can be shown again in the UI.

400.description: No swipe history or daily limit reached

delete.description: Removes a like (or crush) swipe before a mutual match has occurred.

post.description: Soft deletes the match and conversation, and applies a ranking penalty for future discovery.

400.description: Invalid ID or no match exists

BearerAuth.description: Type 'Bearer ' followed by your JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
